hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess as s; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0) if not p.endswith(('.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx')) else sys.exit(s.run(['npx','eslint',p],cwd='c:/OKRON/DEVELOPMENT/okron.web').returncode)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess as s; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0) if not p.endswith(('.ts','.tsx')) else sys.exit(s.run(['npx','tsc','--noEmit','--skipLibCheck'],cwd='c:/OKRON/DEVELOPMENT/okron.web').returncode)"
